completed_tasks.name: Wiring failure mode — LOCKED: PnP + Volume DACL deny-all as two real-time OS-enforced layers; API hooking rejected; minifilter deferred
AGENT-UNKNOWN scope — LOCKED: out of 38.2; split to Phase 38.3 (operational hardening)
Re-plug & tier-change semantics — LOCKED: enable_usb_device and restore_volume_acl both fire on physical removal only (symmetric); no poll-driven tier-change reactivity
Drive-letter mislabel — LOCKED: in scope for 38.2 (folded in; required for DACL targeting and audit clarity)
git_commit — 38.2-DISCUSSION-LOG.md written; commit pending in same batch

decisions.decision: Phase 38.2 scope: PnP enforcement (CM_Disable_DevNode with CM_DISABLE_ABSOLUTE) + Volume DACL deny-all for Blocked tier as two real-time, OS-enforced layers
decisions.rationale: Both layers are real-time and OS-enforced. PnP blocks at device tree (lowest layer); DACL blocks at NTFS check. Combined, every plug-in timing race window is covered.

decisions.decision: User-mode API hooking REJECTED with concrete rationale
decisions.rationale: EDR conflict (Defender/CrowdStrike/SentinelOne quarantine third-party hooking as malware), PPL processes inaccessible, WoW64 split, AppInit_DLLs deprecated, trivially bypassed via cmd.exe/PowerShell, doesn't catch SYSTEM/kernel I/O, CET incompatibility on Win11. NOT real defense in depth.
Multi-week kernel work, signing infrastructure (test → EV), BSOD risk during dev, IPC channel design. Out of 38.2 scope per ROADMAP wording.

decisions.decision: notify-based file watcher demoted to observability ONLY
decisions.rationale: Passive watcher (observe AFTER write); cannot block. PnP + DACL handle real enforcement.

decisions.decision: enable_usb_device and restore_volume_acl fire on physical removal only — NO poll-driven tier-change reactivity
decisions.rationale: Symmetric design avoids race window between PnP/DACL state and tier state. Admin instructs user to unplug & re-plug for tier changes to take effect.

decisions.decision: AGENT-UNKNOWN agent_id remediation split to Phase 38.3 (operational hardening)
decisions.rationale: Admin operational concern (DLP_AGENT_ID env var unset), not code bug. Splitting keeps 38.2 laser-focused on enforcement.
Without correct drive-letter resolution, DACL operations target the wrong volume — breaks the secondary enforcement layer. Surfaced in same evidence; cleans up audit-log noise.

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 38.2 in a fresh session. The planner agent must read 38.2-CONTEXT.md FIRST (it is canonical and contains all locked decisions D-01..D-12). The researcher should focus on D-11 (enumerate every USB plug-in timing path) and D-12 (investigate the WR-01 USB_DEVICE↔VOLUME notification race flagged in Phase 31). The plan must NOT add API hooking, NOT add a minifilter, NOT add poll-driven tier-change reactivity, and MUST include the drive-letter mislabel fix in detection/disk.rs.
context_notes: Phase 38.2 discuss-phase complete. CONTEXT.md (canonical) supersedes the deleted DISCUSS-CHECKPOINT.json and .continue-here.md. All 4 gray areas resolved with explicit user lock-in. Researcher and planner have full context — no re-asking required.
